name: musync
description: Stream your Spotify playlists free via YouTube audio

scripts.build:all: bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/musync-mac-intel && bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/musync-mac-arm && bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/musync-windows.exe && bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/musync-linux
